name: agent-utilities
description: Reusable local utility skills for developer environment setup, package manager maintenance, and agent tool registry workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Utility skills for local developer environments.
interface.longDescription: A personal local plugin for reusable agent utility workflows. It coordinates developer environment checks, setup, updates, package managers such as Scoop, mise, and Homebrew, and a shared registry of agent development tools.
defaultPrompt: Use setup-dev-env to inspect my local developer environment before installing anything.
Use manage-scoop for Windows Scoop checks and updates.
Use manage-mise for mise-managed runtimes and tools.
Use maintain-dev-tool-list to update the shared developer tool registry.
